MASTER CALENDAR MOTION CALENDAR ON JUN-09-2004 IN DEPT. 206, PLAINTIFF MARILEE IRWIN'S MOTION FOR ORDER CONTINUING TRIAL DATE IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE IS CONTINUED FROM 7/12/04 TO 11/8/04 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. THE CURRENT SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE VACATED AND A NEW SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WILL BE SET AND MAILED BY THE COURT.
